title: syringa vulgaris var. albiflora
intro: Syringa vulgaris var. albiflora, also known as white lilac, is a variety of the common lilac plant that is characterized by its white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Syringa vulgaris var. albiflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the plant are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
